author: Rocky
message:
Add TokenTracker to AI Tools (#2101)

Local-first menu bar app and CLI that tracks token usage and cost across
20+ AI coding tools (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini, Copilot, and
more). MIT licensed, no telemetry.
